stemHtml: The ICAO PBN Manual (Doc. 9613) defines a set of navigation specifications for different airspace concepts. Where may a pilot encounter the specification RNP AR APCH?

options.a: En-route and approach segments requiring augmented navigation capability.
options.b: En-route segments requiring augmented navigation capability.
options.c: Approaches that require a specific authorisation to fly.
options.d: A route or part of a route that is airway-regulated.
